name: site-memory
description: Persistent memory for browser automation agents - repeated visits get faster

scripts.bench:download: cd skills/site-memory/tests/webvoyager && curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MinorJerry/WebVoyager/main/data/WebVoyager_data.jsonl -o tasks.jsonl && curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MinorJerry/WebVoyager/main/data/reference_answer.json -o reference_answer.json && echo 'Downloaded 643 tasks'
